titleStmt.title: SII 35.133: original edition by D. M. Nagaraju
No. 133. (A.R. No. 43 of 1950-51.) ARḶĒŚVAR, HANGAL TALUK, DHARWAR DISTRICT.

summary.p: Pillar on the proper right side of the Kadaṁbēśvara temple.
This inscription is dated Chālukya Vikrama-kāla 61, Nala, Chaitra ba. 5, Tuesday, Mēshasaṁkrānti corresponding to A.D. 1136, March 24, Tuesday.

It registers the gift of oil seeds (eḷḷu) made for burning a perpetual lamp before god Kaḍaṁbēśvara by several seṭṭis (names specified) of the (guild of) Five-Hundred, after laving the feet of their preceptor Gaṁgarāśi-paṇḍita. Another gift of oil was made on the same occasion by other seṭṭis and the Seventy Families for the same purpose. Hiṭṭōja engraved the record.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
svasti śrīmaccāḷukya vikramakālada 61 neya naḷasaṁvatsara
da caitra bahuḷa paṁcami maṁgaḷavāra mēśasaṁkrānti vyatipātadaṁdu śrī kaḍaṁbē
svaradēvara naṁdādīvigege Ainū¨rvvara kūgadasanada bāviseṭṭi kalukeṟeya būhiseṭṭi
ganeleya cāviseṭṭi hāvariya dāniseṭṭi Iṁtinibaruṁ Ainū¨rvvasvāmiga
ḷu gaṁgarāsipaṁḍitara kālaṁ ka¨rcci dhārāpū¨rvvakaṁ māḍi biṭṭa dha¨rmmameṁteṁdoḍe
O¨rmmāneḷḷaṁ biṭṭaru © svasti śrīmatu Aḷiyasiriyūra teliga kāṭiseṭṭi bammiseṭṭi
seṭṭi mādiseṭṭi bīriseṭṭi haḷḷiseṭṭi rāmiseṭṭi kāḷiseṭṭi kētiseṭṭi bōciseṭṭi Iṁtu
gara¨rppattokkalu śrīkaḍaṁbēsvaradēvara naṁdādīvigege biṭṭa dha¨rmameṁteṁdoḍe
dalli sollage Eṇneyaṁ biṭṭaru © Iṁtī dha¨rmmamaṁ pratipāḷisidava
¨rgge vāraṇāsi kurukṣētra prayāgeya¨rggetī¨rthadoḷu sāsira kavileyana
ḷida sahita catu¨rvvēdapāragarappa sa¨rrvageṁhnaṇagi Ubheyamukhigoṭṭa paḷamakku
nami pāludeya sāsana Ārittake salisuvenānī sāsanamaneṁba hātaka
daṁ kaurava kka gaḷagaḷaniḷigu © Aḷiyasiriyūra kalukuṭhiga hiṭṭō
jaṁ kaṇḍaṇisidaṁ ©
Digital edition of SII 35.133 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
